turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 90-693, Johnson versus Home State Bank will be announced by Justice Marshall.

turns.name: THURGOOD MARSHALL
turns.text: This case is here on certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. The issue is whether a mortgage lien that passes through the Chapter 7 Bankruptcy is a claim subject to inclusion in the Chapter 13 reorganization plan. In an opinion filed with the Clerk today, we hold that a mortgage lien, in such circumstances, is a claim under the Bankruptcy Code. We, therefore, reverse the judgment of the Tenth Circuit.
